hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat) && printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -c '. + {event_type: "SessionStart", session_id: (.session_id // env.CLAUDE_SESSION_ID)}' | curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- ${CLAUDE_VISUAL_URL:-http://localhost:3200}/api/events > /dev/null 2>&1 ; printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -c '. + {event_type: "SubagentStart", agent_type: "session", session_id: (.session_id // env.CLAUDE_SESSION_ID)}' | curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- ${CLAUDE_VISUAL_URL:-http://localhost:3200}/api/events > /dev/null 2>&1 ; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat) && printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -c '. + {event_type: "SessionEnd", session_id: (.session_id // env.CLAUDE_SESSION_ID)}' | curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- ${CLAUDE_VISUAL_URL:-http://localhost:3200}/api/events > /dev/null 2>&1 ; exit 0
